title: Formula1 Murdoku
specialRules: Not every row and column is occupied
No one was in the water or the grass without being on a stand
Only racers can be inside race cars on the track, otherwise no one was on the track/pit
Not all race car drivers are in the list of clues.

All stands either point left or right and a person in a stand only sees cars in front of the stand. (Aka all columns left of stands that rises and all columns to the right of a stand that goes down (from left to right)
Tent and Wheel cells cannot be occupied
rules: Place everyone on the grid according the their clue to find the murderer. He was in a region alone with the victim.
Maximum of 1 person per row and per column.
"Beside" means in the same room and orthogonally adjacent.
clues: A (Man- Alaric). Racer. Ahead of Bernard.
B (Man - Bernard). Racer. Ahead of Charlie.
C (Man- Charlie). Racer. Ahead of Dexter.
D (Man - Dexter). Racer. Ahead of Emilio.
E (Man- Emilio). Racer. Ahead of Flint.
F (Man- Flint). Racer. He was not in the last car in The Track
G (Woman - Gladys). She was waving the flag on the wooden platform above the finish line.
H (Woman - Hortense). She was in a stand beside a first aid tent.
I (Woman - Imogen). She was in The Garage.
J (Man - Jefferson). He was on a stand only not seeing 1 car.
K (Man - Klaus). He was on a stand seeing 5 cars.
V (Man - Vance). The victim. He was in a region alone with the murderer.
